inputs.srepr: Mul(Symbol('kappa_0', positive=True, real=True), Pow(Add(Integer(1), Mul(Integer(-1), Pow(Symbol('R', positive=True, real=True), Integer(-2)), Pow(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2)))), Integer(2)))

method: compute kappa(R), kappa'(R), F_kappa(R) for kappa=kappa_0*(1-r^2/R^2)^2
scope: toy parabolic-square profile; not derived from trace or relaxation law
